data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for milestone-based billing (% complete invoicing). However, the provided evidence does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions milestone-based billing as a need, but there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that this functionality has been implemented or validated, leading to a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of milestone-based billing (% complete invoicing) being implemented or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for milestone-based billing
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the milestone-based billing functionality.
